summary: Verify edge retraction works after auto-promote: review_edges.py + web reject/reclassify must DELETE the live edge row. Add parity fixture for reject-after-auto-promote.

resolution.note: 4 round-trip tests verify the retraction primitives compose with auto_promote_edges. Parity coverage for CLI↔web reject/reclassify already exists in tests/parity/fixtures/decision_sequence.json (decision-edge-002/003) from PR #1's C7.
